name: Double Almond Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream, milk, and sugar in a medium saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Gradually add the mixture to the beaten egg yolks, whisking constantly.
3. Strain into a double boiler and gradually pour in the remaining cream mix while whisking constantly.
4. Cook over simmering water, stirring, until the mixture thickens slightly and coats the back of a spoon (about 8 minutes). Do not boil.
5. Stir in extracts.
6. Meanwhile, melt butter and sugar in a small saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the sugar begins to bubble (approximately 30 seconds).
7. Add almonds and cook until golden and well coated; cool.
8. Stir almonds into the cream mixture. Pour into an ice cream freezer container and freeze according to manufacturer's directions. Makes 1 quart.
